signals.npcLine: Crypto tides turned cold; shadows lengthen over the neon sprawl.
signals.questPulse: Market cap bleeding, clear skies hide stormy deals.
signals.worldFeed: Global tokens flicker; some vanish into the grid’s abyss.
signals.clueEvent: Chain reactions stoke unrest in downtown bazaars.

signals.npcLine: Sentiment crackling—fear rises, miners brace for fallout.
signals.questPulse: Networks strain under low trust, hacks spike in data veins.
signals.worldFeed: Encrypted chatter warns of asset dumps, vaults go dark.
signals.clueEvent: Ghost trader shadows detected near the black market hub.

signals.npcLine: Asteroid and chip tokens flicker with silent promise.
signals.questPulse: Unseen hands tilt the scale, anomalies in the ledger.
signals.worldFeed: Whispers of new algorithms causing market ripples surface.
signals.clueEvent: Data scavengers find strange code in abandoned blocks.

signals.npcLine: Ethereum and Aave pipelines show irregular pulses—investigate flow.
signals.questPulse: Follow the fading trails in liquidity nodes and shadow contracts.
signals.worldFeed: Nodes offline, traders scramble for data fragments.
signals.clueEvent: Encoded messages spotted in transaction overloads.

signals.npcLine: Old netrunners mutter of shifting forces in this digital war.
signals.questPulse: Seek forgotten vaults lost in market chaos.
signals.worldFeed: Ancient protocols awaken amid current instability.
signals.clueEvent: Rumors of a key hidden in dead code fragments.
